questions.question: What is the new rate of interest ratified by the Government for the ‘employees’ provident fund (EPF) deposits for 2021-22’?
questions.explanation: The Government has approved 8.1 per cent rate of interest on employees’ provident fund (EPF) deposits for the year 2021-22, from 8.5 per cent provided in the previous year. The 8.1 per cent EPF rate of interest is the lowest since 1977-78, when it stood at 8 per cent. The interest rate on EPF deposits was decided by the Central Board of Trustees (CBT) and was ratified by the finance ministry 2021.

questions.question: Which country passed the world’s first “Fair Repair Act”?
questions.explanation: The New York state legislature has recently passed the “Fair Repair Act”, which requires digital electronics manufacturers to make parts, tools, information, and software available to consumers and independent repair shops. The independent repair shops will finally be able to compete with manufacturers. As per the New York assembly, the act levels the playing field for independent repair shops, and reduces the e-waste footprint on the environment.

questions.question: Which is the venue of the ‘Khelo India Youth Games 2021’?
questions.explanation: Union Home Minister Amit Shah inaugurated the fourth edition of Khelo India Youth Games-2021’at Panchkula, Haryana. As many as 4,700 athletes, including 2,262 girls, will be participating in 25 sports. Jay and Vijay are the mascots of the game, with the theme song of ‘Hum Hum’ and regional mascot Dhakad. KIYG 2021 will be held over 5 cities namely Panchkula, Shahbad, Ambala, Chandigarh and Delhi.

questions.question: Which two naval ships were recently decommissioned at Naval Dockyard, Mumbai?
questions.explanation: Indian Navy Ships Nishank and Akshay were decommissioned after their 32 years of glorious service to the nation. The decommissioning event was conducted at Naval Dockyard, Mumbai in a traditional ceremony. While INS Nishank was commissioned in 1989, INS Akshay was commissioned a year later in 1990 at Poti, Georgia.

questions.question: Which institution provides training to IPPB Postmen and Banking correspondents for Aadhar services?
questions.explanation: UIDAI has announced that it would provide IPPB postmen with the necessary digital devices such as a desktop or laptop-based Aadhar kit to update the necessary details of Aadhar card holders. UIDAI also plans to onboard over 13,000 banking correspondents currently working with the Common Service Centre (CSC) of the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.

questions.question: What is the expansion of ‘D2M broadcasting’, which was seen in the news recently?
questions.explanation: The Department of Telecommunications (DoT) and India’s public service broadcaster Prasar Bharati are exploring the feasibility of a technology called ‘direct-to-mobile’ (D2M) broadcasting. It allows broadcasting video and other forms of multimedia content directly to mobile phones, without the need of an active internet connection. The technology is also expected to improve consumption of broadband and utilisation of spectrum.

questions.question: Which city is the headquarters of ‘BIMSTEC’?
questions.explanation: Bay of Bengal Initiative for Multi-Sectoral Technical and Economic Cooperation (BIMSTEC) is headquartered in Dhaka. BIMSTEC Secretary General Tenzin Lekphell addressed the members on the occasion of the 25th Founding Day of the organisation in Dhaka.

questions.question: Which state topped the FSSAI’s 4th State Food Safety Index (SFSI) in 2022?
questions.explanation: Union Minister for Health and Family Welfare Mansukh Mandaviya released the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India’s (FSSAI) 4th State Food Safety Index (SFSI). It measures the performance of States across five parameters of food safety. Among the larger states, Tamil Nadu was the top-ranking state, followed by Gujarat and Maharashtra. Among the smaller states, Goa was first followed by Manipur and Sikkim. Jammu & Kashmir, Delhi and Chandigarh were at first, second and third ranks among UTs.

questions.question: Which is the venue of the ‘Biotech Startup Expo – 2022’, which was inaugurated by the Indian Prime Minister?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently inaugurated the Biotech Startup Expo – 2022 at Pragati Maidan, New Delhi. The Biotech Startup Expo is a two day event organised by the Department of Biotechnology and Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC). It was held to mark completion of ten years of establishment of BIRAC. The theme of the Expo is ‘Biotech Startup Innovations: Towards AatmaNirbhar Bharat’.

questions.question: Which is the first Asian country to legalise the growing and consumption of marijuana?
questions.explanation: Thailand becomes the first Asian country to legalise the growing of marijuana and its consumption in food and drinks, with the aim of boosting its agriculture and tourism sectors. Thailand, which has a tradition of using cannabis to relieve pain and fatigue, legalised medicinal marijuana in 2018. The government plans to give away a million plants as cash crop to encourage farmers to take up its cultivation.
